description: You are a pricing analyst. Using the file sales_data.csv located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv, build a dynamic discount scenario model in Power BI Desktop to simulate a global discount rate (0-50%) and compare revenue against the baseline. Create a parameter named Discount_Rate (Decimal, 0 to 50, increment 1) and two DAX measures: Baseline_Revenue (Sum of Quantity_Sold * Unit_Price * (1 - Discount)) and Projected_Revenue (Sum of Quantity_Sold * Unit_Price * (1 - [Discount_Rate Value] / 100)). On a page named Scenario Analysis, include a slicer for the Discount_Rate, a card showing Projected_Revenue, and a clustered column chart showing Projected_Revenue by Product_Category. Save the report as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Discount_Scenario.pbix.
